name: Escalated issue level
query:
SELECT
    name AS "Issue ID:Link/KSO Support Issue:180",
    subject AS "Subject:Link/KSO Support Issue:250",
    assigned_engineer AS "Assigned Engineer:Link/User:180",
    to_be_verified_by as "To Be Verified By:Link/User",
    severity AS "Severity:Data:120",
    priority AS "Priority:Data:120",
    support_status AS "Status:Data:120",
    escalation_level AS "Escalation Level:Int:120",
    sla_due AS "SLA Due:Datetime:180",
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, sla_due, NOW()) AS "Hours Over SLA:Int:120",
    first_response_time AS "First Response:Datetime:180",
    resolved_on AS "Resolved On:Datetime:180"
FROM `tabKSO Support Issue`
WHERE escalated = 1
AND support_status NOT IN ('Resolved', 'Closed')
ORDER BY escalation_level DESC, sla_due ASC
